damage.value: oversized club d8 w/advantage (close, crude) or iron-shod boots d8+2 w/advantage (hand, forceful)

instinct.value: to brawl, the nastier the better

system.concept: A gang of craggy fae brawlers in iron boots, sworn never to start a fight.
system.qualities: Fae nature; tolerates iron; can't start violence. Armor 4 (resilience), 2 vs. iron.
system.description: A gang of hoodlums, with names like Hobnail, Spitkicker, Big Thunk, Tusk, and Grub: short, squat brutes with lopsided limbs, mismatched parts, and craggy skin, stomping about in oversized iron-shod boots and delighting in the disgust of other Fae. Back in the day they quarried stone; given the chance to fight and spill blood, they became among the most feared shock-troops of the war, first into the fray and dyeing their Red Pennant in trodden foes. After the war, some schemer bought every debt they owed and extracted a promise: no starting fights. They can finish one someone else starts, though — and oh, will they enjoy it.

items.name: Get in your face, dare you
